dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.resolution

Class JkResolutionParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.resolution.JkResolutionParameters

  • public final class JkResolutionParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Contains parameters likely to impact module resolution behavior.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver
      Strategy for resolving version conflict

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      JkResolutionParameters copy() 
      JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver getConflictResolver()
      Returns the conflict resolver to use.
      boolean isFailOnDependencyResolutionError() 
      boolean isRefreshed()
      Returns true if during the resolution phase, the dynamic version must be resolved as well or the cache can be reused.
      static JkResolutionParameters of() 
      JkResolutionParameters setConflictResolver(JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver conflictResolver)
      Set the JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver to use.
      JkResolutionParameters setFailOnDependencyResolutionError(boolean failOnDependencyResolutionError)
      If true this object will throw a JkException whenever a dependency resolution occurs.

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkResolutionParameters of()

      • getConflictResolver

        public JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver getConflictResolver()
        Returns the conflict resolver to use.

      • setConflictResolver

        public JkResolutionParameters setConflictResolver(JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver conflictResolver)
        Set the JkResolutionParameters.JkConflictResolver to use.

      • isRefreshed

        public boolean isRefreshed()
        Returns true if during the resolution phase, the dynamic version must be resolved as well or the cache can be reused.

      • setRefreshed

        public JkResolutionParameters setRefreshed(boolean refreshed)
        See Also:
        isRefreshed()

      • isFailOnDependencyResolutionError

        public boolean isFailOnDependencyResolutionError()

      • setFailOnDependencyResolutionError

        public JkResolutionParameters setFailOnDependencyResolutionError(boolean failOnDependencyResolutionError)
        If true this object will throw a JkException whenever a dependency resolution occurs. Otherwise, just logs a warning message. false by default.

      • copy

        public JkResolutionParameters copy()
